response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio tracks and burnt-in Japanese subtitles match the reference lyrics perfectly, allowing us to accurately identify and translate the songs.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided lyrics, but corrected the second performer to Sakamata Chloe based on visual clues (grey hair, twin tails, red highlights) and adjusted timestamps to perfectly align with actual vocal performance. Included the on-screen song title card for '星座になれたら' as a visual event during the intro.
3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly aligned start and end times to the vocal phrases, leaving silent gaps during instrumentals and performance transitions to ensure clear readability.

subtitles.original: だから不意にピッチ外れるんです
subtitles.english: That is why I suddenly go off-pitch

subtitles.original: その目に映らないだけだってやる気はメーター振り切って
subtitles.english: Even if you can't see it, my motivation's off the charts

subtitles.original: いつでも全力で夢見て その分全力で眠って
subtitles.english: I always dream with all my might, and sleep just as hard to make up for it

subtitles.original: ヤリ ちょい痩せた 調子づいて喰った
subtitles.english: Oh, look, I lost a little weight! So I ate a bunch on impulse

subtitles.original: それだけでなんで？敗北感
subtitles.english: Why do I feel such defeat from just that?

subtitles.original: すかさずに目標 下方修正して
subtitles.english: I immediately lower my goals

subtitles.original: 柔軟に臨機応変 七変化が勝ち
subtitles.english: Flexibility and adaptability, being versatile is the key to winning

subtitles.original: Please don't say "You are lazy"
subtitles.english: Please don't say "You are lazy"

subtitles.original: だって本当はcrazy
subtitles.english: Because actually, I'm crazy

subtitles.original: 孔雀たちはそう
subtitles.english: Peacocks are just like that

subtitles.original: ここぞというとき美を魅せるんです
subtitles.english: They only show off their beauty when it counts

subtitles.original: 五臓六腑 満身邁進
subtitles.english: Heart and soul, giving it my all

subtitles.original: 願望は痩身麗人
subtitles.english: My desire is to be a slender beauty

subtitles.original: 誘惑多発だし…
subtitles.english: There are so many temptations, after all...

subtitles.original: だからやけに意志砕けちゃうんです
subtitles.english: That's why my willpower crumbles so easily

subtitles.original: ヤバ まさか赤点！？いや ギリクリア！
subtitles.english: Oh no, did I fail?! No, I barely passed!

subtitles.original: それだけでなんて全能感
subtitles.english: Why do I feel so omnipotent from just that?

subtitles.original: 大事なのは自分認めてくこと
subtitles.english: The important thing is to accept yourself

subtitles.original: 自分を許さなきゃ他人（ひと）も許せない
subtitles.english: If you don't forgive yourself, you can't forgive others

subtitles.original: Please don't say "You are lazy"
subtitles.english: Please don't say "You are lazy"

subtitles.original: だって本当はcrazy
subtitles.english: Because actually, I'm crazy

subtitles.original: 白鳥たちはそう
subtitles.english: Swans are just like that

subtitles.original: 見えないとこでバタ足するんです
subtitles.english: They are paddling furiously where you can't see

subtitles.original: 本能に従順忠実
subtitles.english: Loyal and faithful to my instincts

subtitles.original: 翻弄も重々承知
subtitles.english: Fully aware of being played with

subtitles.original: 前途洋々だし…
subtitles.english: My future is bright, after all...

subtitles.original: だからたまに休憩しちゃうんです
subtitles.english: That's why I sometimes take a break

subtitles.original: 星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I Could Be A Constellation

subtitles.original: もうすぐ時計は6時
subtitles.english: The clock will soon strike six

subtitles.original: もうそこに一番星
subtitles.english: The first star is already there

subtitles.original: 影を踏んで 夜に紛れたくなる帰り道
subtitles.english: On my way home, I want to step on my shadow and vanish into the night

subtitles.original: どんなに探してみても
subtitles.english: No matter how hard I search

subtitles.original: 一つしかない星
subtitles.english: There's only one star

subtitles.original: 何億光年 離れたところからあんなに輝く
subtitles.english: Shining so brightly from billions of light-years away

subtitles.original: いいな 君は みんなから愛されて
subtitles.english: It's nice, you are loved by everyone

subtitles.original: 「いいや 僕は ずっと一人きりさ」
subtitles.english: "No, I've always been all alone"

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation

subtitles.original: 星降る夜 一瞬の願い事
subtitles.english: On a night of falling stars, a split-second wish

subtitles.original: きらめいて ゆらめいて
subtitles.english: Twinkling, swaying

subtitles.original: 震えてるシグナル
subtitles.english: A trembling signal

subtitles.original: 君と集まって星座になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could gather with you and become a constellation

subtitles.original: 空見上げて 指を差されるような
subtitles.english: Looking up at the sky, as if being pointed at
